identity.name: Chitrakatha
identity.tagline: Preserving the moments that matter most through real moments and raw emotion
identity.logo_instructions: Use the logo image. Ensure it is visible against dark backgrounds. If necessary, add a subtle white glow or place in a white container if the red clashes too much with the dark theme, but prefer transparent integration.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D32F2F] text-white hover:bg-[#B71C1C] rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.service: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-all duration-500 p-8 group relative overflow-hidden

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-black/50 border-b border-white/5

gallery.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 flex items-center justify-center

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install fonts 'Playfair Display', 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Manrope' from Google Fonts immediately.
2. Theme: Enforce Dark Mode by default. Do not create a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked. The brand is 'Cinematic Noir'.
3. Navigation: Create a public Navbar (Home, Gallery, Services, About, Login) and a Dashboard Sidebar (Overview, Projects, Bookings, Settings).
4. Dashboard: Use the 'High Density' grid mode. It should feel like a professional cockpit for the client.
5. Gallery: Use a masonry layout using CSS columns (columns-1 md:columns-3). Implement a modal/lightbox for viewing full size.
6. Animations: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and scroll reveals. All images should have a subtle zoom on hover.
7. Services: Display the 4 packages (Traditional, Semi-Cinematic, Cinematic, Premium) as distinct cards with hierarchy. Highlight 'Premium' with a gold border.
8. Logo: The logo has a red background. In the Navbar, use a small version. On the hero, you might need to use a 'mix-blend-mode' or a container to make it look integrated.
9. Tech: Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'sonner' for notifications.
10. Testing: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
